clean_text:
RAIL VIKAS NIGAM LIMITED
(A Government of India Enterprise   Ministry of Railways)
Southern Zone Project Office, RVNL House, 16 Miller's Road, Bengaluru   560 052
NOTICE INVITING e-TENDER
NIT No.: RVNL/SZ/MYS-DIV/ROB/2026-27/003
Date of Issue: 28 May 2026
CONSTRUCTION OF ROAD OVER BRIDGE (ROB) AT KM 134+600
Mysuru Bengaluru Rail Section (SBC MYS Doubling Project)
(Replacing Level Crossing Gate No. 46, Mandya District, Karnataka)
1. INTRODUCTION
Rail Vikas Nigam Limited (RVNL), Southern Zone, invites online tenders from
eligible contractors for the following work:
Work Name     : Construction of ROB (5-span prestressed concrete bridge,
                total span 120 m) at Km 134+600, Mysuru Bengaluru Doubling,
                Mandya District, Karnataka. Includes approach roads (1.2 km
                each side), retaining walls, and railway track protection works.
Estimated Cost : Rs. 18,50,00,000/- (Rs. Eighteen Crore Fifty Lakh)
EMD            : Rs. 37,00,000/-
Performance Security : 5% of contract value
Completion Period : 24 months from date of commencement
Defect Liability : 36 months
NOTE: This NIT includes CORRIGENDUM NO. 1 (dated 07 June 2026) and
CORRIGENDUM NO. 2 (dated 19 June 2026). Bidders MUST read all three sections.
The latest corrigendum supersedes all prior versions on amended items.
2. KEY DATES
Publication of NIT              : 28 May 2026
Corrigendum No. 1               : 07 June 2026
Corrigendum No. 2               : 19 June 2026
Last date for submission        : 15 July 2026, 15:00 hrs
Opening of Technical Bids       : 17 July 2026, 11:00 hrs
3. SCOPE OF WORK
3.1 Bridge Structure (Main Span)
  (a) 5-span prestressed concrete box girder bridge, total length 120 m
      (span arrangement 24+24+24+24+24 m), 7.5 m carriageway + 2x1.5 m
      footpaths, designed for 2-lane NH loading.

  (b) RCC pier foundations (4 piers)   bored cast-in-situ piles, pile
      diameter 1.2 m, depth as per pile load test results.
  (c) Two abutments with wing walls.
  (d) Wearing coat (bituminous), expansion joints, bridge railings (MS).
3.2 Approach Roads
  Two approach roads, 1.2 km each side:
  - 3-lane carriageway (10.5 m wide), flexible pavement design.
  - Subgrade preparation, GSB, WMM, DBM, BC as per MoRTH specifications.
  - Storm water drains (NPC drain, RCC hume pipe, catch pits).
  - Road markings, delineators, kilometre stones.
3.3 Railway Protection Works (Critical)
  - Railway track protection arrangement during foundation work.
  - Temporary/permanent speed restrictions as per Railway Engineering Dept.
  - Third-party inspection by Railway officials mandatory at each stage.
  - Block possessions to be coordinated with SWR Divisional Railway Manager.
3.4 Dismantling
  - Dismantling of existing level crossing gate (LC Gate No. 46).
  - Diversion of traffic during construction.
4. ELIGIBILITY CRITERIA
Note: The eligibility criteria below reflect CORRIGENDUM NO. 2 (dated
19 June 2026), which is the final and governing version. For reference,
the original NIT criteria and Corrigendum No. 1 amendments are reproduced
in Section 8 (Corrigendum No. 1) and Section 9 (Corrigendum No. 2).
Table 1   Mandatory Eligibility Criteria (as amended by Corrigendum No. 2)
Sl. | Criterion              | Requirement
 1  | Annual Turnover        | Average Annual Turnover not less than
    |                        | Rs. 55.00 Crore per year from civil / structural
    |                        | works including bridges, in each of the last 3
    |                        | financial years (FY 2023-24, 2024-25, 2025-26)
 2  | Technical Experience   | Successfully completed at least 2 (two) bridge
    |                        | or Road Over Bridge construction works, each of
    |                        | value not less than Rs. 9.00 Crore, in the last
    |                        | 7 (seven) years
 3  | RVNL / Railway Enroll  | Valid enrolment as approved contractor with RVNL
    |                        | (Category: Civil/Bridge) OR with any Zonal
    |                        | Railway under Indian Railways in equivalent class
 4  | ISO Certification      | Valid ISO 9001:2015 certification (current) AND
    |                        | ISO 14001:2015 certification (current)

 5  | Net Worth              | Net Worth not less than Rs. 8.00 Crore as on
    |                        | 31 March 2026, certified by Chartered Accountant
Note on Similar Works: "Bridge or ROB construction" includes: road over
bridges, railway over bridges, flyovers, grade separators, and major
bridges (span > 30 m). Approach road construction alone does not qualify.
Highway road construction, canal / irrigation works, and building
construction do NOT qualify as similar works for this criterion.
5. SUBMISSION FORMAT
5.1 Two-Envelope System
  Envelope 1 (Technical): eligibility documents, EMD, affidavit
  Envelope 2 (Financial): item-rate schedule (online)
5.2 Percentage above/below RVNL Schedule of Rates (Civil), 2025 edition.
6. CONTRACT CONDITIONS
6.1 RVNL Standard Contract Conditions (2022 edition) shall apply.
6.2 Liquidated Damages: 1% per fortnight, maximum 10% of contract value.
6.3 All works involving railway track proximity require block possessions
    approved by SWR Divisional Railway Manager, Mysuru.
6.4 Contractor to arrange third-party quality audit per RVNL QAP.
7. GENERAL NOTES
7.1 RVNL reserves the right to reject any or all tenders.
7.2 Disputes subject to arbitration under RVNL SCC 2022 and Delhi courts.
7.3 Anti-canvassing: immediate disqualification.
8. CORRIGENDUM NO. 1
Reference: NIT No. RVNL/SZ/MYS-DIV/ROB/2026-27/003
Date of Corrigendum No. 1: 07 June 2026
The following amendment is hereby made to the NIT dated 28 May 2026:
Item 1   Eligibility: Annual Turnover (Table 1, Sl. 1)
  Original requirement (NIT dated 28 May 2026):

    Average Annual Turnover not less than Rs. 30.00 Crore per year from
  Amended requirement (Corrigendum No. 1):
    Average Annual Turnover not less than Rs. 50.00 Crore per year from
  Reason: Foundation design revised from open foundation to piled foundation
  following preliminary soil investigation. Pile depths increased from 12 m
  to 22 m. Estimated project cost increased by approximately 32% to
  Rs. 18.50 Crore (was Rs. 14.00 Crore). Turnover threshold revised
  proportionally.
Item 2   Estimated Cost
  Original: Rs. 14,00,00,000/- (Rs. Fourteen Crore)
  Amended:  Rs. 18,50,00,000/- (Rs. Eighteen Crore Fifty Lakh)
Item 3   EMD
  Original: Rs. 28,00,000/-
  Amended:  Rs. 37,00,000/-
All other terms and conditions of the NIT dated 28 May 2026 remain unchanged.
9. CORRIGENDUM NO. 2
Reference: NIT No. RVNL/SZ/MYS-DIV/ROB/2026-27/003
Date of Corrigendum No. 2: 19 June 2026
The following further amendments are hereby made. Corrigendum No. 2
supersedes Corrigendum No. 1 on amended items, and the NIT dated 28 May
2026 on all items amended herein.
Item 1   Eligibility: Annual Turnover (Table 1, Sl. 1)
  Requirement as per Corrigendum No. 1 (07 June 2026):
    Average Annual Turnover not less than Rs. 50.00 Crore per year.
  Further amended requirement (Corrigendum No. 2):
    Average Annual Turnover not less than Rs. 55.00 Crore per year from
  Reason: Detailed Estimate approved by RVNL Finance revised upward by
  10% following finalization of pile load test specifications and revised
  traffic management plan cost. Turnover threshold adjusted to reflect
  the approved project cost of Rs. 18.50 Crore.
Item 2   Eligibility: Technical Experience (Table 1, Sl. 2)

  Original requirement (NIT dated 28 May 2026):
    At least 2 (two) bridge or ROB works, each of value not less than
    Rs. 7.50 Crore, in the last 7 years.
  Amended requirement (Corrigendum No. 2):
    At least 2 (two) bridge or ROB works, each of value not less than
    Rs. 9.00 Crore, in the last 7 years.
  Reason: Threshold revised in line with revised estimated project cost.
Item 3   Completion Period
  Corrigendum No. 1: 24 months (unchanged from NIT)
  Corrigendum No. 2: 26 months (revised for extended foundation works)
All other terms and conditions remain unchanged.
Bidders who have downloaded the original NIT or the document as amended by
Corrigendum No. 1 must note these further amendments. Corrigendum No. 2 is
available on the RVNL e-Tender portal under the same NIT reference.
10. CONTACT
Deputy General Manager (Civil)
RVNL Southern Zone Project Office
RVNL House, 16 Miller's Road, Bengaluru   560 052
Phone: 080-2286-1234
Email: dgm-civil.sz@rvnl.org
END OF NIT (INCLUDES CORRIGENDUM NO. 1 AND CORRIGENDUM NO. 2)
NIT No.: RVNL/SZ/MYS-DIV/ROB/2026-27/003
